description: User dashboard shows stat cards with priority-ordered reservations
steps: Verify user.dashboard.tsx imports and renders StatCard components
Verify stat cards show: Active, Planned, Completed, Messages, Customizations
Verify user.dashboard.tsx imports and renders DashboardPropertyList
Verify DashboardPropertyList groups reservations by priority: in-progress > planned > completed
Verify completed section is collapsed by default
Build succeeds: npm run build

description: Company dashboard shows stats, charts, and pending actions
steps: Verify company.dashboard.tsx imports and renders StatCard components
Verify stat cards show: Buildings, Flats, Houses, Revenue, Pending Reservations
Verify company.dashboard.tsx renders RevenueChart with monthly revenue data
Verify company.dashboard.tsx renders OccupancyChart with available/reserved/sold data
Verify company.dashboard.tsx shows Pending Actions section with approve/reject buttons
Verify pending actions are limited to 5 items with a View All link
Verify RoleGuard uses allowedRole='company' prop
Build succeeds: npm run build

description: Contractor dashboard shows stats, charts, and priority-ordered projects
steps: Verify contractor.dashboard.tsx imports and renders StatCard components
Verify stat cards show: Active Projects, Total Projects, Completed, Revenue
Verify contractor.dashboard.tsx renders ProjectProgressChart for in-progress projects
Verify contractor.dashboard.tsx renders RevenueChart with monthly data
Verify contractor.dashboard.tsx renders PrioritySection components for in_progress, upcoming, completed
Verify completed section uses defaultCollapsed prop
Verify RoleGuard uses allowedRole='contractor' prop
Build succeeds: npm run build
